item.title: Version 1.1.6
item.description: - Stability improvements. - Minor bug fixes. - Added support for actionable banners on the home screen.

item.title: Version 1.1.5
item.description: - Improved stability of the Retake process. - Improved camera behavior on iPad. - Screen now stays active during the entire photo capture process, preventing auto-lock interruptions in automatic mode. - Optimized data loading for retake photo information - Fixed a display issue where order product images could briefly appear empty on the home screen. - General stability improvements and bug fixes.

item.title: Version 1.1.4
item.description: - Fixes to the retake process, which in certain conditions prevented continuing the process. - UI Enhancements to the retake process, to clarify the processing process after the last photo is taken. - Various minor corrections and improvements in application stability.

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description: - Correction of various errors in the order process, which in certain conditions prevented continuing the process. - It is now possible to navigate back/forward through the order creation screens to review/adjust data. - Reduction of order loading times on screen. - Improvements in user session management. - Improvements in the photo upload process in background. - Various minor corrections and improvements in application stability.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description: - Compatibility with new 2026 product structures. - New capabilities for selecting color combinations. - Improvements to the ordering process and to photo upload speed during ordering. - New, clearer order completion screens. - Improved visibility on terminals when using enlarged UI sizes via the operating system's Accessibility settings. - Minor stability improvements and bug fixes.
